scenario: Lattice Insurance operates Java job workers for 12 tenants across 3 environments in Camunda 8.8 and processes 8000 claims per day. The platform team wants every newly opened worker on a shared client to default to the same set of tenant identifiers without repeating the tenantIds builder call in 40 worker classes, and the client is already authorized for all 12 tenants.
question: Which environment variable configures default tenant ids for Camunda 8.8 Java job workers?

options.text: CAMUNDA_CLIENT_WORKER_TENANT_IDS sets the default tenant identifiers for every job worker opened by a Camunda 8.8 Java client, across all tenants the client is authorized for
CAMUNDA_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_TENANT_IDS sets the default tenant identifiers for every job worker opened by a Camunda 8.8 Java client, across all tenants the client is authorized for
ZEEBE_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_TENANT_IDS sets the default tenant identifiers for every job worker opened by a Camunda 8.8 Java client, across all tenants the client is authorized for
CAMUNDA_TENANT_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_IDS sets the default tenant identifiers for every job worker opened by a Camunda 8.8 Java client, across all tenants the client is authorized for

a.text: Incorrect. CAMUNDA_CLIENT_WORKER_TENANT_IDS is not the documented environment variable; the Java client reads default worker tenants from CAMUNDA_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_TENANT_IDS, with the equivalent system property camunda.client.worker.tenantIds.

b.text: Correct. Camunda 8.8 documents CAMUNDA_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_TENANT_IDS as the environment variable that sets default tenants for every worker opened on the client; the equivalent system property is camunda.client.worker.tenantIds, and the client must be authorized for all listed tenants.

c.text: Incorrect. The Camunda 8.8 unified client documents the CAMUNDA_ prefix rather than the legacy ZEEBE_ prefix for default tenants; the documented variable is CAMUNDA_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_TENANT_IDS.

d.text: Incorrect. The token order CAMUNDA_TENANT_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_IDS does not match the documented Camunda 8.8 variable; the correct form is CAMUNDA_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_TENANT_IDS.

explanation: Default tenants for Java job workers in Camunda 8.8 are configured via the environment variable CAMUNDA_DEFAULT_JOB_WORKER_TENANT_IDS or the system property camunda.client.worker.tenantIds. The client must be authorized for every tenant in the list, otherwise the worker will not pick up any jobs.
